description:
## What to build

Implement the first issue explorer slice from `docs/research/design/mockups/issue_explorer_functional_sidebar.png` as independently landable tasks. The slice should list real Beadwork issues from the current workspace using `bw list --all --json`, expose a narrowed `IssueSummary` contract through TauRPC, load it through an Effect frontend service, and render it in the issue explorer shell.

Only listing all issues is in scope. Search, sidebar filters, workspace switching, issue selection, and issue detail behavior remain out of scope except for visual or empty-state scaffolding.

## Child tasks

- `bsm-8ul` - Add pure Rust bw list adapter for IssueSummary.
- `bsm-tes` - Build the static three-pane issue explorer shell.
- Reference source checkout task - Add TauRPC and Effect reference source under `docs/research/infra/`.
- TauRPC boundary task - Expose issue summaries through the typed Tauri RPC boundary.
- Effect service task - Load issue summaries through the frontend service layer.
- Render task - Render real IssueSummary rows in the issue explorer.

## Dependency order

```mermaid
graph LR
    R[Reference TauRPC + Effect source] --> T[TauRPC command boundary]
    A[Pure Rust bw list adapter] --> T
    T --> E[Effect issue summary service]
    S[Static three-pane shell] --> V[Render real IssueSummary rows]
    E --> V
```

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] The Rust adapter lands independently of Tauri/TauRPC wiring.
- [ ] The static shell lands independently of backend data loading.
- [ ] TauRPC and Effect are adopted as the standard integration path for frontend-to-Rust app functionality.
- [ ] The final slice lists all real Beadwork issues across stored statuses.
- [ ] The final UI preserves loading, empty, and error states while keeping the shell mounted.

## Triage

ready-for-agent
title: Epic: List all issues in the issue explorer
